RouteExtensionMethods Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The RouteExtensionMethods type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
Handle(IMethodRoute, String, IResponseBuilderSelector)
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request that takes no input data.
Handle(IMethodRoute, String, ActionIRequest)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
Handle(IMethodRoute, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, Task)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data, and returns no data.
HandleTContent(IMethodRoute, String, IResponseBuilder)
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
HandleTContent(IMethodRoute, String, IResponseBuilderSelector)
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
HandleTContent(IMethodRoute, String, ActionTContent, IRequest)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
HandleTResult(IMethodRoute, String, FuncIRequest, TResult)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
HandleTResult(IMethodRoute, String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
HandleTContent(IMethodRoute, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, Task)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
HandleTContent, TResult(IMethodRoute, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, TResult)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
HandleTContent, TResult(IMethodRoute, String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
HandleGet(IMethodRoute, IResponseBuilderSelector, Type)
Defines a generic GET handler for an HTTP request.
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, T)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request and returns JSON data.
WithT
WithParameterT
WithRoute
Creates a route with the specified suffix, and adds it to the method.
